params.name: Metaphysics
params.description: Metaphysics is a seminal work by Aristotle, the great philosopher of ancient Greece. In this book, he focuses on exploring the essence and principles of existence, proposing the concept of substance and establishing a unique ontological system. By analyzing the four causes of things—material, form, efficient, and final—he elucidates the internal logic of the generation and change of all things. This profound revelation of the nature of motion and change not only deepens the understanding of the  …
